# transport-bar

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata toolbar transport: play/pause button and a Synthesia-style speed stepper ([− xx% +]) with live BPM. Contributes to Sonata.Toolbar.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Toolbar` "playback" → `PlaybackControls`
  - Uses: `apps/sonata/shell.Sonata`, `apps/sonata/shell.useSonata`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/text.Text`
